name: ftrack-framework-core

metadata.name: ftrack-framework-core
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# Framework Core

This is the ftrack integrations framework-core library.
Client, Host, Registry, extensions bases and all the base code for the framework should be found here.

modules.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry
documentation: :coding: utf-8
:copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 ftrack

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.schemas
documentation: Returns the registered schemas`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.tool_configs
documentation: Returns the registered tool_configs`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.plugins
documentation: Returns the registered plugins`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.engines
documentation: Returns the registered engines`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.widgets
documentation: Returns the registered engines`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.dialogs
documentation: Returns the registered engines`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.launch_configs
documentation: Returns the registered launcher configs`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.dcc_configs
documentation: Returns the registered dcc configs`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.__init__
documentation: Initialise Registry

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.scan_extensions
documentation:
Scan framework extension modules from the given *paths*. If *extension_types*
is given, only consider the given extension types.
Register

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.add
documentation:
Add the given *extension_type* with *name*, *extension* and *path to
the registry

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry._get
documentation:
Check given *extensions* list to match given *name*, *extension* and *path* if
neither provided, return all available extensions

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.get
documentation:
Return given matching *name*, *extension*, *path* or *extension_type*.
If nothing provided, return all available extensions.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.get_one
documentation:
Return the extension mathing the given arguments, if not found or
multiple found raise exception.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry.create_unic_references
documentation:
Augment the given *tool_config* to add a reference id to it
and each plugin and group

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.registry.Registry._recursive_create_reference
documentation:
Recursive method to add reference number to each plugin and group of the
given engine portion of a tool_config.

modules.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine
documentation: :coding: utf-8
:copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 ftrack

classes.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.session
documentation: Returns instance of {class}`ftrack_api.session.Session`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.context_id
documentation: Returns the context_id where the engine is been executed

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.__init__
documentation:
Initialise BaseEngine with given *plugin_registry*, *session* and
optional *on_plugin_executed* callback to communicate with the host.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.run_ui_hook
documentation:
If given *plugin* is in the plugin registry, initialize it with the
given *options* and execute the ui_hook method passing given *payload*
as argument.
*plugin*: Name of the plugin to be executed.
*payload*: data.
*options*: options to be passed to the plugin
*reference*: reference id of the plugin

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.run_plugin
documentation:
If given *plugin* is in the plugin registry, initialize it with the
given *options* and execute run method passing given *store* as argument.
*plugin*: Name of the plugin to be executed.
*store*: registry of plugin data.
*options*: options to be passed to the plugin
*reference*: reference id of the plugin

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.execute_engine
documentation:
Execute given *engine* from a tool-config.
*engine*: Portion list of a tool-config with groups and plugins.
*user_options*: dictionary with options passed by the client to
the plugins.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.register
documentation: Register function for the engine to be discovered.

class_variables.name: ftrack_framework_core.engine.BaseEngine.engine_types
documentation: Engine type for this engine class
Base engine class.

documentation: Set the new context ID based on data provided in *event*

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.host_connection.HostConnection._check_context_identifiers

Find context identifiers (Based on the context id, are we in a task,

documentation: Filter *tool_configs* on *context_identifiers* and discoverable.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.host_connection.HostConnection._add_new_tool_configs
documentation:
Add new tool_configs compatible with the new context,
also purge the non-compatible ones

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.host_connection.HostConnection.reset_all_tool_configs
documentation: Reset all tool_configs to its original values sent from host

Host Connection Base class.
This class is used to communicate between the client and the host.

modules.name: ftrack_framework_core.plugin.plugin_info
documentation: :coding: utf-8
:copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 ftrack

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.plugin.plugin_info.PluginInfo.__init__
documentation:
Class to manage and store plugin execution information.

This class handles the synchronization between the plugin's status
and its boolean representation, and maintains other relevant information
about the plugin's execution.

*name*: Name of the plugin.
*reference*: Reference identifier for the plugin.
*options*: Options used for plugin execution.
*store*: Optional store for plugin-related data.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.plugin.plugin_info.PluginInfo.to_dict
documentation:
Returns a dictionary representation of the plugin information.
Replaces the key '_plugin_status' with 'status'.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.tool_configs

Widget

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.dialog
documentation: Return the current active dialog

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.dialog
documentation: Set the given *value* as the current active dialog

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.registry
documentation: Return registry object

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.__init__
documentation:
Initialise Client with instance of
{class}`~ftrack_framework_core.event.EventManager`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.discover_host
documentation:
Find for available hosts during the optional *time_out*.

This removes all previously discovered host connections.
Host

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._host_discovered_callback
documentation:
Reply callback of the discover host event, generate
{class}`~ftrack_framework_core.client.HostConnection`
of all discovered hosts from the given *event*.

*event*: {class}`ftrack_api.event.base.Event`

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.on_host_changed
documentation: Called when the host has been (re-)selected by the user.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._host_context_changed_callback
documentation: Set the new context ID based on data provided in *event*
Context

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.on_context_changed
documentation:
Called when the context has been set or changed within the
host connection, either from this client or remote
(other client or the host).

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._unsubscribe_host_context_changed
documentation: Unsubscribe to client context change events

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.run_tool_config
documentation:
Publish event to tell the host to run the given *tool_config_reference*
on the engine.
*tool_config_reference*: id number of the tool config.
Tool config

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.on_log_item_added_callback
documentation: Called when a log item has added in the host.
Plugin

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.on_ui_hook_callback
documentation:
Called ui_hook has been executed on host and needs to notify UI with
the result.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.reset_all_tool_configs
documentation: Ask host connection to reset values of all tool_configs

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.run_tool
documentation:
Client runs the tool passed from the DCC config, can run run_dialog
if the tool has UI or directly run_tool_config if it doesn't.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.run_dialog
documentation:
Function to show a framework dialog by name *dialog_name* from the
client, using *dialog_class* or picking class from registry. Passes on
*dialog_options* to the dialog.
*dock_func* is an optional function to dock the dialog in a way for a specific DCC
UI

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._register_dialog
documentation: Register the given initialized *dialog* to the dialogs registry

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.set_active_dialog
documentation: Remove focus from the *old_dialog* and set the *new_dialog*

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._connect_methods_callback
documentation:
Callback from the dialog to execute the given *method_name* from the
client with the given *arguments* call the given *callback* once we have
the result

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._connect_setter_property_callback
documentation:
Callback from the dialog, set the given *property_name* from the
client to the given *value*

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._connect_getter_property_callback
documentation: Callback from the dialog, return the value of the given *property_name*

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.set_config_options
documentation: Set the given *options* to the given *tool_config_reference* or to the given *item_reference*(meaning to plugin or group) if provided.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.run_ui_hook
documentation:
Publish event to tell the host to run the given *tool_config_reference*
on the engine.
*tool_config_reference*: id number of the tool config.
*plugin_config_reference*: id number of the plugin config.
*payload*: dictionary of data to send to the plugin.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.verify_plugins
documentation: Verify if the given *plugins* are registered in the host registry.

class_variables.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client.ui_types
documentation: Compatible UI for this client.

class_variables.name: ftrack_framework_core.client.Client._host_connection
documentation: The singleton host connection used by all clients within the process space / DCC
Base client class.

modules.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info
documentation: :coding: utf-8
:copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 ftrack

classes.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo._conform_data
documentation:
Creates the FtrackAssetInfo object from the given dictionary on the
*mapping* argument

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the FtrackAssetInfo with the given *mapping*.

*mapping* Dictionary with the asset information.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.encode_options
documentation:
Encodes the json value from the given *asset_info_options*
to base64.

*asset_info_opitons* : Options used to load the asset in the scene.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.decode_options
documentation:
Decodes the json value from the given *asset_info_options*
from base64.

*asset_info_opitons* : Options used to load the asset in the scene.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.__getitem__
documentation:
Get the value from the given *k*

Note:: In case of the given *k* is the asset_info_options it will
automatically return the decoded json.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.__setitem__
documentation:
Sets the given *v* into the given *k*

Note:: In case of the given *k* is the asset_info_options it will
automatically encode the given json value to base64

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.get
documentation:
If exists, returns the value of the given *k* otherwise returns
*default*.

*k* : Key of the current dictionary.

*default* : Default value of the given Key.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.setdefault
documentation:
Sets the *default* value for the given *k*.

*k* : Key of the current dictionary.

*default* : Default value of the given Key.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo._check_asset_info_dependencies
documentation:
Return all the dependencies as asset_info. In case the dependency is a
string convert it to asset_info. (This maya for example)

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.asset_info.FtrackAssetInfo.create
documentation:
Returns an {class}`~ftrack_framework_core.asset.FtrackAssetInfo` object
generated from the given *asset_version_entity*, and *component_name*.

*asset_version_entity* : {class}`ftrack_api.entity.asset_version.AssetVersion`

*component_name* : Component name

*component_path* : Component path

*component_id* : Component id

*load_mode* : Load mode

*asset_info_options* : Asset info options

*objects_loaded* : Objects loaded

*reference_object* : Reference object
Base FtrackAssetInfo class.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.dcc_object.DccObject._name_exists

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.dcc_object.DccObject.from_asset_info_id

Checks the dcc to get all the ftrack objects. Compares them
with the given *asset_info_id* and returns them if matches.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.dcc_object.DccObject.dictionary_from_object
documentation:
Static method to be used without initializing the current class.
Returns a dictionary with the keys and values of the given
*object_name* if exists.

*object_name* ftrack object type from the DCC.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.asset.dcc_object.DccObject.connect_objects
documentation:
Link the given *objects* ftrack attribute to the self
{obj}`name` object asset_link attribute in the DCC.

*objects* List of DCC objects

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.widget.FrameworkWidget.plugin_run_callback
documentation:
Receive the callback with the plugin info every time a plugin has been
executed. *log_item* is the plugin info dictionary.

NOTE: Make sure this is executed in the QT/DCC main thread as this might be
called asynchronously.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.widget.FrameworkWidget.run_ui_hook
documentation: Call the on_run_ui_hook method from the dialog with the given *payload*.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.widget.FrameworkWidget.ui_hook_callback
documentation:
Get the result of the ui_hook method from the plugin, should be overriden
as needed by the inheriting class.

NOTE: Make sure this is executed in the QT/DCC main thread as this might be
called asynchronously.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.widget.FrameworkWidget.populate
documentation: Fetch info from plugin to populate the widget

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.widget.FrameworkWidget.register
documentation:
Register function to discover widget by class *cls*. Returns False if the
class is not registerable.
Base class to represent a Widget of the framework

documentation:
To be overriden by the implemented dialog. Should execute the dialog:
Pseudocode example PySide UI:
self.show()

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.ui_closed
documentation: Should be called by the inheriting class when the dialog is closed

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._on_client_context_changed_callback
documentation:
Will only run if the widget is active
Callback for when context has changed in client.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._on_tool_config_changed_callback
documentation: Callback for when tool_config has changed.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._on_focus_changed
documentation:
Set the *new_widget* as active and synchronize the context, host and
tool config with the client.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.sync_context
documentation:
Check if selected UI context_id is not sync with the client and sync them.
Pseudocode example PySide UI:
if self.context_id not is self.context_Selector.current_text():
    raise confirmation widget to decide which one to keep
    equal self.context_Selector.current_text() to self.context_id or
    the other way around depending on the confirmation widget response

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.sync_host_connection
documentation: Check if UI selected host_connection is not sync with the client and sync them.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.init_framework_widget
documentation:
Method to initialize a framework widget given in the *plugin_config*.
*group_config* as optional argument in case is part of a group.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._register_widget
documentation: Registers the initialized *widget* to the dialog registry.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.unregister_widget
documentation: Remove the given *widget_name* from the registered widgets.

documentation: Enables widgets call dialog methods

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._connect_dialog_property_getter_connection_callback
documentation: Enables widgets to call dialog properties

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.run_tool_config
documentation:
Run button from the UI has been clicked.
Tell client to run the current tool config

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._on_client_notify_ui_log_item_added_callback
documentation: Client notify dialog that a new log item has been added.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.plugin_run_callback
documentation:
Dialog to receive the callback with the plugin info every time a plugin has been
executed. To be overridden by the inheriting class.
*log_item* is the plugin info dictionary.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog._on_client_notify_ui_hook_result_callback
documentation: Client notify ui with the result of running the UI hook.

documentation: Pass the given *options* of the *plugin_reference* to the client.

documentation: Set the given name and value as options for the current tool config.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.set_option_callback
documentation: Pass the given *args* to the client set_config_options method.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.widget.dialog.FrameworkDialog.register
documentation:
Register function to discover widget by class *cls*. Returns False if the
class is not registrable.

Base Class to represent a FrameworkDialog, all the dialogs executed by the
UI should inherit from here.

Maintain the synchronization between asset_info and the ftrack information of
the objects in the scene.
TODO: review asset_info ftrack object_manager and dcc_object, we should
always use the manager only try to review the well use of it. Maybe
asset info or DCC object can be removed.

modules.name: ftrack_framework_core.configure_logging
documentation: :coding: utf-8
:copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 ftrack

functions.name: ftrack_framework_core.configure_logging.get_log_directory
documentation:
Get log directory.

Will create the directory (recursively) if it does not exist.

Raise if the directory can not be created.

functions.name: ftrack_framework_core.configure_logging.configure_logging
documentation:
Configure `logger_name` loggers with console and file handler, will scan
sys path and log framework modules to file if *add_extra_framework_modules* is set
to true (default).

Optionally specify log *level* (default WARNING)

Optionally set *logging_format*, default:
`%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s`.

Optional *extra_modules* to extend the modules to be set to *level*.

modules.name: ftrack_framework_core.host
documentation: :coding: utf-8
:copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 ftrack

functions.name: ftrack_framework_core.host.provide_host_information
documentation:
Returns dictionary with host id, host name, context id and tool_config from
the given *id*, *tool_configs* and *name*.

*id* : Host id

*tool_configs* : Dictionary with a valid tool_configs

*name* : Host name
TODO: this is the discover_host_reply function:
1. Double check if this should better be part of the host class as a method.
2. Rename it to discover_host_reply_callback or similar?

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.event.EventManager._subscribe
documentation:
Subscribe to ftrack events on the session event hub for *topic* with
*callback*. Topic should not include the 'topic=' prefix.

methods.name: ftrack_framework_core.event.EventManager.unsubscribe
documentation:
Unsubscribe from ftrack events on the session event hub for subscription
identified by *subscribe_id*. Important to call this on object deletion to
release dangling callback reference in memory
Manages the events handling.
